name: EGCG + Caffeine
summary: EGCG + Caffeine is tracked for AMPK; COMT; adenosine antagonism with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: EGCG + Caffeine is tracked for AMPK; COMT; adenosine antagonism with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.3: Green tea catechin/caffeine effects are modest; liver/caffeine cautions are essential.
claimMap.notes: v10.3: Green tea catechin/caffeine effects are modest; liver/caffeine cautions are essential.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: EGCG/caffeine trial doses vary; avoid high-dose EGCG and fasting use
